main.name: Zaitech Development
main.description: Backend, Mobile, and Embedded Systems Development
main.bio: At Zaitech Development, we design, develop, and scale innovative technology solutions. Our expertise in building robust e-commerce and payment processing platforms has enabled us to process hundreds of thousands of orders and generate significant revenue growth for our partners. We have successfully expanded market reach across borders, transforming platforms into versatile, multilingual systems. Additionally, our track record in scaling hardware deployments—from a handful of devices to over 230,000 units—demonstrates our commitment to operational excellence and innovation.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch to explore how we can drive technological innovation for your business.

resume.skillmessage: We leverage a broad spectrum of cutting-edge technologies to deliver innovative solutions.
resume.progsmessage: Our development expertise spans multiple programming languages and paradigms, ensuring robust and scalable systems.

education.description: Our founder's academic background from the University of Brasilia laid the foundation for a commitment to excellence in engineering, innovation, and leadership.

work.title: Project: E-commerce Platform Expansion
work.description: Designed and developed a robust e-commerce platform that processes hundreds of thousands of orders and generates tens of millions in revenue. Successfully expanded the platform from the Netherlands to Belgium, incorporating multilingual and multi-country capabilities. Technologies: GCP, Golang, Docker, CI/CD.

work.title: Project: Manufacturing Efficiency Enhancement
work.description: Implemented a system to reduce machine calibration and startup times by 8 hours, streamlining production workflows and enhancing overall efficiency. Technologies: Python, C, C++, Unit Testing.

work.title: Project: POS System Modernization
work.description: Scaled a POS system from fewer than 10 devices to over 230,000 active units. Played a key role in transitioning legacy Linux-based systems to modern Android platforms, ensuring improved reliability and scalability. Technologies: Kotlin, Android, Agile methodologies.

work.title: Project: Machine Learning Service Optimization
work.description: Developed a production-grade machine learning backend for real-time position detection, optimizing response times and modernizing legacy systems. Technologies: Python, Flask, CI/CD, DevOps.

work.title: Project: Health Records System Enhancement
work.description: Optimized parallel processing for health records, significantly reducing processing time while implementing FHIR standards and modernizing backend services. Technologies: Spring Boot, Kotlin, React Native.

work.title: Project: Secure Embedded Systems Development
work.description: Developed automated tests and new features for a cryptographic chip-based embedded system, enhancing security and performance for critical defense applications.

awardsAndPubs.title: Paper Publication
awardsAndPubs.description: Recognition in automation engineering with a published paper on advanced control systems.

awardsAndPubs.title: Honorable Mention
awardsAndPubs.description: Awarded for innovative research in secure telecommunications and chaotic systems.

awardsAndPubs.title: 3rd Place - Open/Fire-Fighting Category
awardsAndPubs.description: Achieved 3rd place in the world's largest open robot competition, demonstrating excellence in autonomous robotics for fire protection.

awardsAndPubs.title: 2nd Place - Open/Tube Push Category
awardsAndPubs.description: Secured 2nd place in a competitive robotics event focused on precision and automation.

projects.title: Machine Assembler
projects.category: An educational assembler, parser, and pre-processor designed to demonstrate machine language fundamentals.

projects.title: Generic Camera Calibrator
projects.category: A tool for calibrating camera intrinsic and extrinsic parameters using OpenCV and chessboard patterns.

projects.title: ML Production Service
projects.category: A project that scales a basic machine learning model into a production-grade web service.

projects.title: Bombeirinho

projects.title: Tobinho

testimonials.text: Zaitech Development delivered exceptional technical leadership and project management, enabling our collaboration to exceed expectations and achieve significant milestones.
The team's innovative approach and commitment to excellence transformed our project, showcasing the strength of Zaitech Development's expertise.
Working with Zaitech Development has been a game-changer. Their ability to integrate advanced technologies and lead complex projects is truly impressive.
